description_long: This object is a classic assault rifle with a dark metallic body and wooden furniture, including the stock and handguard. The rifle features a long, straight barrel with a front sight post and a gas tube above the barrel. The receiver is robust and boxy, with a prominent magazine well holding a curved, detachable magazine. The trigger and trigger guard are clearly visible, as is the charging handle on the right side. The overall design is reminiscent of the AK-47, known for its durability and use in urban and military environments.
description: A dark metal assault rifle with wooden stock and handguard, featuring a curved magazine and prominent iron sights.
description_view_0: The rifle is seen from the barrel end, showing the front sight post and the narrow profile of the barrel and gas tube.
description_view_1: The left side of the rifle is visible, highlighting the wooden stock, handguard, curved magazine, and iron sights.
description_view_2: The rifle is viewed from the buttstock end, showing the rear of the receiver and the alignment of the stock and barrel.
description_view_3: The right side of the rifle is visible, displaying the charging handle, trigger, and the full length of the wooden and metal components.
